page_content:
CPSA200 College Park Scholars: Arts Second-Year Colloquium | (1 Credit)

Advanced colloquium I: Examination of the arts in society; and preparation for "Scholarship-in-Practice” project.

Prerequisite: CPSA101.

Restriction: Students must be matriculated into the College Park Scholars Arts (CPSA) program.

Additional Information: When paired with successful completion of CPSA 240, 250 or 260, students will earn General Education Scholarship-in- Practice credit.
